title: [Warning] Warning: ADCADA Investments AG PCC and ADCADA Immobilien AG PCC
text: The FMA points out that for the bonds „ADCADA.healthcare Anleihe 2020“, „adcada.money Hypozins“ and „adcada.money Festzins” issued by ADCADA Investments AG PCC, Ruggell, registration number FL-0002.600.340-0, and ADCADA Immobilien AG PCC, Ruggell, registration number FL-0002.605.851-4, no prospectuses were approved. Offers are made without an approved securities prospectus by the supervisory authority.   The FMA points out that every investment in securities involves certain risks. Investors therefore should carefully consider the risks and seek advice.
